scripts.build:html: node scripts/build-classes.js && node scripts/build-levels.js && node scripts/build-venues.js && node scripts/build-registration.js
scripts.build:css: sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-gonzaga.scss docs/assets/theme-gonzaga.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-zabumba.scss docs/assets/theme-zabumba.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-sanfona.scss docs/assets/theme-sanfona.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-baiao.scss docs/assets/theme-baiao.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-roots.scss docs/assets/theme-roots.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-abraco.scss docs/assets/theme-abraco.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-mandacaru.scss docs/assets/theme-mandacaru.css && sass --no-source-map src/styles/theme-triangulo.scss docs/assets/theme-triangulo.css
scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.verify: npm run lint:css && npm run build && npm run test:contrast
